_description: All tunable parameters for the drowsiness detector. Modify values below to adapt to your setup.

ear_threshold.description: Eye Aspect Ratio threshold below which eyes are considered closed
ear_threshold.notes: Lower for people with naturally narrow eyes, higher for wide-open eyes

ear_consec_frames.description: Minimum consecutive frames with EAR below threshold to count as a blink
ear_consec_frames.notes: Higher values reduce false positives but may miss fast blinks

degradation_weight.description: Weight given to Blink Quality Degradation Index (vs EAR-based score)
degradation_weight.notes: EAR weight = 1.0 - degradation_weight. Default: 40% EAR + 60% degradation

calibration_blinks.description: Number of initial blinks required for calibration
calibration_blinks.notes: More blinks = more accurate baseline, but longer calibration time

calibration_timeout_sec.description: Maximum seconds to wait for calibration before proceeding with defaults
calibration_timeout_sec.notes: After timeout, system uses default baseline blink speed

blink_history_size.description: Number of recent blinks to average for degradation calculation
blink_history_size.notes: Larger window = smoother but slower response to changes

drowsiness_thresholds.description: Drowsiness score thresholds for warning (yellow) and critical (red) alerts

alert_cooldown_sec.description: Minimum seconds between consecutive buzzer alerts

gpio_pins.description: BCM GPIO pin numbers for hardware outputs
gpio_pins.notes: Change only if your wiring differs from the default schematic

camera.notes: Lower resolution for better performance on Pi. Index 0 = default camera.

display.notes: Set show_video to false for headless operation (Pi without monitor)

logging.notes: Circular buffer keeps last max_events entries. Set console_debug for verbose output.

performance.notes: Reduce frame_scale on Pi for speed. Increase min_face_size to skip small/distant faces.

mock_mode.description: Enable mock mode for testing without a webcam
mock_mode.notes: Generates synthetic frames with simulated blink patterns
